transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log, it's the 19th, so this is for the 18th. I forgot to do my video last night, just spaced it, and then I was hanging in bed, and I was like, what? I did a big video.

Yeah, I got up really early, I was going to ride my bike over to Lyons, like 12 miles away to do this house, but my clock said it, my phone said it was 28 degrees, which is well freezing, and it intimidated me.

But then I drove out there, and it heated up really quickly, and I saw somebody out there, so I felt like a total sissy, then came back into another house, then came back here, so I went into the gym for like an hour and worked out, and my roommate even left in the morning before I drove, so what I need to do is get up really early and ride in the cold weather and know that I can do it with all the nice warm clothes and just get used to it.
And then I'll be able to do that, but I don't think I'll chicken out on riding through the cold in the morning again.
And then I did my video on Lives of the Twelve Caesars, but I have to have breakfast now, so anyways, that was my V-Log for yesterday.
Man, these, I'm almost done with my crickets, I only got new crickets for 15 bucks like a week ago, dude, they're way more expensive than they said they would be.
That's why I think I'm going to sell one of my crickets, because they're just eating too many, I mean sell my geckos, because they're eating too many crickets.
